Outputs
=======

LePIC produces diagnostic outputs in ASCII ``.mco`` format.

Main directories:

.. code-block:: text

   Output/
   Output/Output_2D/

2D Planes
---------

Supported planes:

* XY
* XZ
* YZ

Typical diagnostics:

* potential ``phi``
* densities ``n1``, ``n2``
* charge density ``rho``
* temperatures
* electric fields
